title: Observability, SLOs, Drift, Incidents, and Recovery
description: A RAG endpoint records total latency and full prompts, cannot distinguish retrieval from generation failure, and notices stale results only after users complain. Learners cumulatively produce redacted stage trace and reliability dashboard through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Trace retrieval and generation operations with stable run, corpus, model, index, query, document, score, error, and version attributes aligned to current GenAI conventions.
Define availability, freshness, candidate recall proxy, grounded-answer success, citation integrity, latency, saturation, and cost service indicators and objectives.
Keep query and content capture disabled or tightly governed and bound labels, exemplars, hashes, sampling, retention, and cardinality.
